info.name: GenX CRM Integration API

query.description: Case-insensitive exact match on email. Returns 200 with empty array if not found.

request.description: List CRM leads with optional filtering and offset-based pagination. Results ordered by created_at descending.

response.name: 200 — Success
response.body:
{
  "data": {
    "leads": [
      {
        "id": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
        "first_name": "John",
        "last_name": "Doe",
        "email": "john@example.com",
        "phone": "+919876543210",
        "city": "Mumbai",
        "country": "India",
        "status": "new",
        "stage_id": "s1a2b3c4-d5e6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890",
        "stage_slug": "new",
        "stage_name": "New",
        "assigned_to": null,
        "assigned_name": null,
        "custom_fields": {},
        "file_urls": {},
        "intake_source": "integration",
        "intake_medium": null,
        "intake_campaign": null,
        "preferred_contact_method": null,
        "is_final": true,
        "created_at": "2026-02-26T10:30:00.000Z",
        "updated_at": "2026-02-26T10:30:00.000Z"
      }
    ],
    "total": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "offset": 0
  }
}

response.name: 401 — Unauthorized

request.description: Create a new lead. Required: first_name, email. Stage resolved from stage_id → status slug → tenant default. Supports Idempotency-Key header.

response.name: 201 — Created
response.body:

  "data": {
    "id": "b2c3d4e5-f6a7-8901-bcde-f12345678901",

request.description: Get all checklist items for a lead, ordered by position ascending.

response.name: 200 — Success

request.description: List all pipeline stages for the tenant, ordered by position ascending.

response.name: 200 — Success
response.body:
{

request.description: Get the full pipeline view with stages and their grouped leads. All stages returned even if empty.
